summary: Completed backend API testing for Here & Now mobile app (React Native/Expo). All 23 tests passed. Backend endpoints for auth (login, register, profile) and mobile push notifications (register/unregister) are working correctly. Mobile app file structure verified - all screens, navigation, API utilities, and push notification services exist.
action_items: User needs to add google-services.json file for Firebase push notifications to work on Android
Mobile app cannot be tested in this environment (requires Expo on physical device/emulator)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend mobile push endpoints (POST /api/push/mobile/register, DELETE /api/push/mobile/unregister) are correctly implemented at server.py lines 7108-7137
Mobile API utility (/app/mobile/src/utils/api.js) correctly includes all required endpoints including push registration
Push notification service (/app/mobile/src/utils/pushNotifications.js) properly configured with Expo notifications and Android channels
RegisterScreen.js sends date_of_birth but not show_as - this is OK as show_as is handled in OnboardingGenderScreen after registration
App.json correctly configured with package ID 'com.herenow.app' and Firebase/Google Maps integration
All 14 mobile screens exist in correct directory structure
AuthContext.js properly handles token storage with expo-secure-store

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Mobile app requires Expo environment

test_credentials.provided_credentials: test@mobile.com / Test1234! (not tested - may need to be created)

seed_data_creation: Created test users dynamically during testing with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile app backend APIs are fully tested and working. The mobile app itself (React Native/Expo) cannot be tested in this environment - requires physical device or emulator with Expo. Firebase push notifications require google-services.json file from user. All mobile screen files exist and API utility has correct endpoints.

features_verified.POST /api/auth/register: WORKING - Requires email, password, display_name, date_of_birth. Returns token and user object
features_verified.POST /api/auth/login: WORKING - Returns token and user object with all profile fields
features_verified.PUT /api/auth/profile: WORKING - Requires photo upload first for new users (expected behavior)
features_verified.POST /api/push/mobile/register: WORKING - Accepts Expo push token and platform, stores in mobile_push_tokens collection
features_verified.DELETE /api/push/mobile/unregister: WORKING - Removes push token for authenticated user
features_verified.Mobile screen files: ALL EXIST - 5 auth screens + 9 main screens
features_verified.Navigation structure: VERIFIED - AppNavigator.js with proper auth/main flow
features_verified.API utility: VERIFIED - api.js has all required endpoints
